title: Ap Tan Ngai heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Ap Tan Ngai, with a Z-Score of +3.26. The heat wave has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ap Tan Ngai is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.4 GG. 
 The humidity is also very high, at 80%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is relatively low, at 5.5 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately
